summary: Daily Orientation Layer testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: OrientationCard renders on Feed and Profile pages with correct message, CTA, and compass icon. CTA navigation works correctly (View Feed stays on feed, Create Action navigates to post). Page structure verified: Feed shows Position Bar → Orientation Card → Visibility Tabs → Category Filters; Profile shows User Info → Position Bar → Orientation Card → Trust Engine → Stats.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/orientation/{user_id} correctly returns: message, action_type, cta, context (with position, label, public/private counts, days_inactive, unique_reactors, active_referrals)
Decision rules working correctly (first match wins): no-actions→post, Emerging+low reactors→react, Contributing+referrals→react
OrientationCard component uses data-testid attributes: orientation-card, orientation-msg, orientation-cta
CTA navigation correctly maps: post/visibility/re_engage→'post' target, react/share/verify→'feed' target
Position calculation is inlined in orientation endpoint to avoid circular API calls
Context object in response enables frontend debugging with all decision factors

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified via browser automation)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Orientation Layer fully tested. OrientationCard appears on Feed (line 186) and Profile (line 82) pages. CTA navigation uses ProductApp's navigate function passed as onNavigate prop. Key data-testids: orientation-card, orientation-msg, orientation-cta. Decision rules are deterministic - first match wins. User A (Contributing) gets 'engage more' message with 'View Feed' CTA. User B (Emerging with low reactors) gets 'Engage with others' message. New users get 'Post your first action' with 'Create Action' CTA.
